name: conditional-get fetcher: a 304 updates the freshness timestamp without changing the stored content hash
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id gcp --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 200 --etag e1 --body-hash keep-hash >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conditional-get.sh" --source-id gcp --store-dir "$PWD/store" --simulate-status 304 --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z && grep -q keep-hash "$PWD/store/gcp.json" && echo hash-kept 1>&2
